stinkiness-level-medium: You could do with taking a bath.
towel-item-info-fold: Needs to be folded before stacking with other dry towels.
bathtime:item-handbooktext-bathtime:towe: A delightful fluffy towel. Use this to dry off after taking a bath or getting caught out in the rain. You will have to let it dry off before you can use it again. Be careful not to carry it with you when you go diving into lakes, or it'll get soaking wet!
